name: Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg, mix with butter/sour milk and oil until well combined.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients in the first bowl, stirring just enough to moisten.
4. Stir together the cranberries and 1/2 cup sugar.
5. Mix the cranberry mixture into the batter.
6. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
